title: Research notes: how music moves behavior — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Every research note in one place. How store music moves sales, dwell time, and spending, how premium a store feels, and the psychology of chills, tempo, and taste. Each note graded against the peer-reviewed evidence.

schema.headline: Research notes: how music moves behavior
schema.description: The full library of research notes on how music shapes what people do, on the retail floor and off it. Answer-first, graded against the peer-reviewed evidence, with sources on every note.
